method_summary: AIBuildAI-2 is a knowledge-enhanced agent with an external, evolving knowledge system for automatically building AI models. The system is hierarchical, organizing curated AI development knowledge into high-level instructions and low-level documents, dynamically loading relevant context and grounding decisions in externally verifiable expertise.
key_innovation: An external, evolving knowledge system that addresses the limitations of static, outdated, and sparse parametric knowledge in large language models.
title: AIBuildAI-2: Scalable Agentic AI Research and Engineering
